name: analytics-events
tagline: Guides adding typed Snowplow analytics tracking events to the Metabase frontend.
verdict: Clear, example-rich TypeScript workflow with good PII-avoidance advice and worked examples for every format it requires. Weak spots: no scope exclusions (risks misfiring vs the sibling add-tracing skill), a vague 'special cases' fork for custom schemas with no criteria, no duplicate-event/re-run guard, no versioning, and a SKILL.md that runs long for its.

highlights.summary: Description says what it does ('Add product analytics events...') but never states a 'use when'/trigger phrasing.
No NOT-for exclusions; plausible confusion with sibling 'add-tracing' skill (tracking vs tracing).
~505 lines inline with many repeated full examples/patterns that could be split into reference files.
